description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the fedora:latest Docker image as the default and defines two stages: prep and build. Add a tito_prep job in the prep stage that runs the script ./.gitlab-ci/get-tarballs.sh, uploads the resulting ./*/*.tar.gz files as artifacts that expire after 1 hour, and runs on docker tags. Add a pkg_build job in the build stage that depends on tito_prep, uses the ubuntu:18.04 image, executes the scripts ./.gitlab-ci/setup-apt-sources.sh, ./.gitlab-ci/get-debbuild.sh, ./.gitlab-ci/get-deb-buildreqs.sh, and ./.gitlab-ci/build-packages.sh in sequence, and stores the generated ./*/*/*.sdeb and ./*/*/*/*.deb files as artifacts that expire after 5 days, also running on docker tags.
